title: Hair Serum to stop shedding
body:
Over the years, I’ve tried different hair serums, but many left my hair feeling sticky or oily—some even caused breakouts and scalp irritation. I eventually decided to stop testing new hair serums and stuck with Vegamour GRO Hair Serum (thanks to the subscription discount!). Since then, I’ve noticed significantly less hair shedding, and I couldn’t be happier with the results.
I’ve also tried the Vegamour GRO+ Advanced Hair Serum, which not only helps with hair loss but also promotes a healthier scalp. Definitely will alter the two Vegamour hair serums from time to time.

title: Awful Customer Service
body:
Vegamour has increased the shipping charges on my subscription three times without providing any prior notice. When I requested to cancel the order due to these unexpected charges, they refused to honor the cancellation.

Instead, they instructed me to return the product at my own expense, which is completely unreasonable given that the order should have been canceled in the first place.

This approach feels highly unethical and misleading. It gives the impression that the company prioritizes profit over customer trust. Customers deserve transparency and fair treatment, and this kind of practice reflects poorly on the brand.

title: LOVE it,BUT . . .
body: Ok. Weird “Review”!  Love,LOVE your products, but your products are WORKING me to tears.😭!  Maybe I’m using too many. I just have to slow down and test some for myself.  I believe that because I was using the “ SHOP” app that I would get double products, therefore I have probably 20 bottles of GRO products, a dozen of the dry shampoo, etc. I LOVE your products!!! title: Consistency is the key...
body:
I've been using GRO for a few years, with small breaks a few times when traveling abroad for weeks at a time and was not able to take it. I will say, it works, but consistency is key. Recently I went 3 weeks without using it and my hair was noticeably thinner and was shedding a lot.  It takes a long time to get back that thickness and quality, though the shedding has stopped.  I also take supplements with a lot of Biotin, so together they work. But like I said, it is no quick fix. Use it daily and you will see gradual improvement; takes about 3 full months to get back to fuller hair if you stop using it.
I also tried the grey serum, but have to say, didn't see appreciable results, or at least not enough to warrant the expense and high maintenance.

title: Good intentions not well executed
body: I tried Vegmour due to its reviews but two things really disappointed me. First of all 1ml (18-19 drops) is not enough to cover the scalp with your product. title: It works great for my hair!
body:
I gifted by Vegamour in exchange for my honest review. I’ve been using the Vegamour GRO Jumbo Hair Serum daily for a few months now, and honestly, it's one of the better hair growth serums I’ve tried. The texture is super lightweight—not greasy or sticky at all—so I can use it every morning without messing up my styling. I focus on my thinning areas and massage it in, and it absorbs quickly.

What I love is that it's plant-based and doesn't have that harsh chemical smell. It's gentle on my scalp and doesn’t cause any irritation. I started noticing less shedding after the first month, and by the third month, some baby hairs started popping up—especially around my hairline.

It does require patience and consistency, but if you're looking for a clean, vegan solution that feels good and actually helps reduce shedding, this one is worth a shot. I’d recommend getting the jumbo size if you're committed because it lasts longer and is more cost-effective in the long run.

title: Works but it takes time.
body: I've used this for over a year now. In the beginning, I had no faith because at the rate my hair was falling, there was no way I could grow any more. I went to the dermatologist and asked if the ingredients in this serum would even work. The doctor said it should work because there seemed to be nothing wrong with it. Everyone's hair growth takes time. I expected results within 3-6 months, but did not see anything till the 8th month. Once the 8th month hit, I saw a bunch of little hairs sprouting from the top of my head. Yes, it's an awkward length, but I would take it over hair constantly falling. I have used it every single day, only on parts that are visually thinning. But as much as this serum worked, it will only work if you change your lifestyle to ensure you aren't purposely making your hair fall. I changed my routine and made sure I took time off to relax. I stopped tying my hair up and let it down most of the time. My family has a history of hair thinning, so I'm glad I started this when I did. I can't imagine myself having bald spots at the age of 20.

title: Great product
body:
Gifted by VEGAMOUR 
I've been trying to address a specific area of hair loss on my scalp. After seeing some initial improvement with rosemary oil, I was intrigued by the VEGAMOUR GRO Hair Serum, especially with its claims of being the #1 Prestige Hair Serum for thinning and shedding, backed by plant-based ingredients and clinical testing. I was hopeful it would offer even better, faster results.

While I appreciated the lightweight texture of the serum, the recommended daily application quickly became a challenge for my fine hair, which tends to get oily. Even shortly after washing, applying the serum made my hair look like it needed another wash, which wasn't ideal for days I wanted to wear my hair down. I found myself mostly using it on second or third-day hair or when I had my hair styled up.

Despite this, after consistently using the VEGAMOUR GRO Hair Serum for three months, I did observe a noticeable positive change in the area of concern, and I also saw some encouraging new hair growth along my hairline. In terms of stimulating regrowth, the product did seem to work.

title: Works well
body: I received this product complimentary from vegamour and tested it for 3 months in exchange for my honest review. There's a spot on my head of which I have dealt with hair loss practically all of my life. It wasn't until recently that I decided to try some different methods to see if I could regrow some of the area. I started out by using rosemary oil and I did see some results but I wanted to see if another product would give me better, and potentially faster results. So when I received this, I was excited to give it a try. The directions say that you need to apply this serum daily which quickly became impractical. I have fine hair and my scalp can be quick to get oily sometimes. Though the serum is lightweight, with my fine hair, it would often look like it was oily even if I had washed it not long ago. If I wanted to wear my hair down, I would not use this. I usually would only use it on second or third day hair or when I wore it up. After using this product for 3 months, I have noticed a difference in the area I've been trying to regrow and I also noticed some regrowth around the hairline. Overall, though I think the product worked well, I'm not sure that I really noticed a difference in results with this serum in comparison to the rosemary oil I used previously. I probably would not repurchase this product in the future for that reason.

title: My Experience with GRO Hair Serum – Jumbo Size
body:
Complimentary from vegamour, okay, let’s talk hair for a second—specifically shedding and thinning, which had become a regular part of my routine (and not the kind I asked for). I decided to give GRO Hair Serum a shot because I kept seeing the reviews and results everywhere, and honestly? I was intrigued by the fact that it’s clean, drug-free, and packed with plant-based ingredients. Plus… peptides and stem cells? I’m listening.

I’ve now been using it consistently for over a month—just one dropper a day, massaged directly into the scalp. It’s super easy to fit into my routine. I actually keep it right next to my toothbrush so I never forget (habit stacking for the win). The formula is water-based, lightweight, and non-greasy, which I love because it doesn’t mess with my styling or make my scalp feel heavy. And the scent? Subtle and fresh, with a soft citrus-floral vibe that doesn’t linger.

The biggest change I’ve noticed? Way less shedding. Like, noticeably less hair in my brush and on the bathroom floor. My roots also feel fuller, and the overall density of my hair is starting to feel thicker. I wasn’t expecting to see anything so soon, but now I get the hype. I’m excited to see how things evolve over the full 90 days and beyond.

What really drew me in was the ingredient list: turmeric, caffeine, red clover, mung bean—yes please to all things that nourish the scalp and support growth without harsh chemicals. Clean, clinically proven, and no fluff? That matters to me, especially with anything I’m using daily.

Will I keep using it? Absolutely. This jumbo bottle is a 3-month supply and I’m already planning to restock. I’ve recommended it to two friends already—and I can’t wait to see their before & afters too.

If you’re struggling with thinning or shedding and want a clean, science-backed option that fits seamlessly into your day, this is a solid go-to. And bonus points for being vegan, cruelty-free, and award-winning with over 23K 5-star reviews. They weren’t wrong.

title: Transforming my hair after postpartum
body: Firstly, I decided to use this hair serum because, about a year ago, I had a baby, and the postpartum effects caused extreme hair loss, weakening, and the appearance of bald spots on my scalp. However, after using this serum gifted by vegamour for the past three months, I can confidently say it has made a noticeable difference in both the texture and overall health of my hair. I initially chose this product mainly for its natural ingredients and because it’s vegan, which allows me to avoid chemicals on my scalp. The application method was very easy; I simply applied a few drops all over my scalp before going to bed. The drops have a lightweight texture, don’t leave a greasy feeling, and absorb quickly. However, I did notice that if I went more than two days without washing my hair, it tended to get dirtier more quickly. Since I started using the serum, I’ve noticed a significant reduction in frizz. My hair looks healthier, with less hair loss, thicker, stronger, and, most importantly, fuller. I will definitely continue using this serum to maintain the results and fully restore the health of my hair. I would highly recommend it to anyone looking to strengthen and thicken their hair, as well as reduce hair loss.

title: A clean, effective way to support fuller, thicker, healthier hair
body:
I decided to try Vegamour GRO Hair Serum because I wanted a clean, effective way to support fuller, thicker, healthier hair. My hair is long and thin, and while I wasn’t expecting instant results, I was hoping for something to strengthen it and improve its overall density.

After about two months of consistent use, I’ve noticed my hair feels stronger, sheds less, and has more volume at the roots. It’s lightweight, non-greasy, and absorbs quickly—so easy to fit into my routine! The biggest change? My hair looks healthier overall, and I can see baby hairs coming in around my hairline, which is exciting.

What really sold me on this serum is the clinically proven, plant-based ingredients like caffeine, peptides, and turmeric. I’m careful about what I put on my scalp, and I love that this formula is vegan and free from harsh chemicals. It’s reassuring to know I’m using something effective yet gentle.

To maintain these results, I’m sticking with my routine—applying the serum daily and being patient. Fuller, thicker hair doesn’t happen overnight, but I love the progress so far! I’ll definitely keep using it and would recommend it to anyone looking for a clean, non-toxic option for healthier hair. gifted by Vegamour

title: Patience & consistency is key!
body:
Complimentary from Vegamour, for my honest thoughts and opinions.  
I have been testing this product for three months!  I do love that this is so quick and easy to apply with the dropper.  I just drop some hair serum all over,  mainly in the roots.  I then take a scalp massager and give my head a good massage.  The hair serum is lightly scented, I like it.  I wasn't really seeing any major results, until the middle of the second  month.  I can see all these small flyaways all on top.  Also running my fingers through my scalp and feeling around, I can feel baby hairs.  I've also noticed, because I've had to color my  roots a lot more often.   I will say my hair still sheds, but not as much as before.  Consistency and patience is key.  I do like my results, and I'm going to continue using the serum.  Plus I do like how it makes my hair feel healthy, especially since I do color my hair often.

title: Great serum to try for fuller hair
body: I picked up the Vegamour GRO Hair Serum because of my very thinning hair. I had heard that it is a once-a day, easy to use, water-based, non-greasy serum that could be used on wet or dry hair. I was excited for the benefits I read about - increasing appearance of thicker, fuller hair, reducing signs of shedding and fallout, and my hair feeling stronger and more resilient. I also heard that this serum uses clean, clinically proven ingredients in its formula. I got this complimentary from Vegamour and after using it for about 3 months now, I can say that I see slight improvement. I didn’t always use this daily as it is recommended during this 3 month duration so that may be why my results weren’t more than they are. I definitely plan to continue using the supply I have and may purchase a few months worth before I truly decide if my hair saw positive change with this product. I would recommend this because I have heard several people say they had positive outcomes with this serum and because I also saw some improvements to my hair thickness and fullness in certain spots.

title: LEGIT HAIR GROWTH SERUM!!
body: I can finally leave a review after so long. After having my first child going through postpartum was difficult. Us women are vulnerable during this state, we’re insecure when it comes to our hair loss during this stage of mother hood. As a young mom my confidence needed a lot of boosting to feel like myself again. And my hair loss was where I wanted to start. I did research online to find hair growth serums that would help me gain my confidence back as a woman and new mother. I came across Vegamour and read the reviews on their GRO hair growth serums that mothers during postpartum were leaving on this product. Now I am a visual reviewer and once I seen the before and after of these women’s hair I was convinced. I had to buy myself this serum. I gave birth in October and started to notice really huge bald spots in Jan/Feb (see pictures) on both corners of my forehead where my baby hairs used to be. After using the serum from when I received my order in March I immediately seen results in April, then a lot more results wi tho my hair growing in May and finally grew all the baby hair in the corners of my forehead I loss by June. As women we deserve a bit of uplifting change that can boost our mental health especially to feeling beautiful when we always are. I felt so restored with this product and I advertise it to all my mommas I come across because this is the first and only product I ran to and trusted that made the outcome tremendously better than I expected.

title: Life Saver in a Bottle - An Honest Review
body: Long story short, I had a horrible experience coming off birth control (IUD) where I lost half of my hair primarily under my head. My confidence was destroyed, and I didn't realize how much of it came from my once full, wavy mane. Then I found Vegamour; I have been using this product for over two years now. I use the GRO shampoo and conditioner combined with the serum. While everyone is different, it took me about two years to see the full effect vegamour had on my hair. My shedding and hair thinning have reduced significantly where I have little coming out after showering and brushing.  Don't get me wrong, you can notice new hair growth almost immediately after using the serum for a week. But if your goal is to get your hair back to what it used to be, this process will require faith, patience and strength. There were times when I felt hopeless about my hair regrowth journey. But I promise, if you keep up with your hair routine and focus on nutrition, your hair will slowly but surely get back to what it almost used to be. In addition to the serum, I used a silk bonnet to protect my hair at night, ate enough protein, scalp massages and used protective hair styles to reduce breakage which helped a lot. To this day, my hair is still not the mane it used to be, but the difference is incredible compared to when I started using Vegamour. If you are looking for a more holistic way to regrow your hair, this is it. I would recommend this product to anyone. The first three pictures are from Dec 2022 to Now.

title: The hype is real! Vegamour’s GRO Hair Serum transformed my hair.
body:
I started using the Vegamour GRO Hair Serum about 4 months ago after looking for products to address apparent thinning across my hairline and worrisome fallout in the shower. I am F/27.

I have always had fine hair, but a good amount of it. From 16 to 23, I bleached my hair, but I never saw thinning or fallout like I did before trying Vegamour’s GRO Serum. 

Note: I’m also in recovery, so I’ve been free of alcohol, etc., for 2 years; before that, my hair was extremely thin from malnutrition and poor health for about 2 years.

I hadn’t dyed (or even cut) my hair for about 9 months when I started to notice the thinning/fallout. I believe the thinning was a result of hair breakage from pulling up my hair tightly and brushing it while wet.

So, I went online and googled “best hair products for thinning hair and fallout.” I saw Vegamour’s serum listed on an Elle magazine listicle of  “The 10 Best Hair Growth Serums for a Fuller Mane.” 

I also did a deep dive on Reddit, which showed mixed reviews, but I trusted my gut and ordered the GRO Serum. It was one of the greatest beauty purchase decisions I’ve ever made!

I regularly use a Sunny Isle hair mask (currently, using the one with Rosemary & Mint, but all their products have castor oil). I’ve learned castor oil can help with scalp health, dullness, and tangles, but overuse can actually build up on the scalp, causing fallout.

With Vegamour’s GRO Serum, I have been able to balance my castor oil use with a serum that ensures far less breakage. I have baby hairs for the first time ever, and my boyfriend regularly comments that he has noticed more growth around my hairline (which he never thought was patchy before!).

I’ve since learned two ingredients in particular are  central to the GRO Serum’s efficacy: Safflower oil and red clover (though, the serum is packed with other natural compounds that are amazing for hair health and reducing fallout!).

Safflower oil is lighter than castor oil (as well as noncomedogenic) and increases blood flow to the scalp, while also protecting hair from environmental toxins.

Red clover was a surprising secret weapon! I’m from Ohio, which is abundant with red clover up until winter, in many cases. But, I didn’t know that red clover has shown clinical effectiveness for hair restoration because of its isoflavone quality, a component that is similar to estrogen. 

This aspect of red clover blocks a hormone called DHT, which is an androgenic hormone (I.e., “masculine” hormone). DHT is problematic because it shrinks hair follicles and keeps hair from absorbing nutrients, such as those you consume in food and drinks, in addition to those you apply topically through shampoo, conditioner, oils, etc.

Since using the GRO Serum, I have had so many comments about my hair growth and thickness, including family members who are very familiar with my hair’s usual state. 

I love love love this product and recommend it to everyone. My only complaint is the cost, but you get what you pay for, and this is worth the expense! (I also tend to use more than one dropper-full, so I end up purchasing a bottle every three weeks instead once a month, as directed, so that’s my issue!)

Buy the Vegamour GRO Serum if you have thinning hair, fallout, or bald patches; but, also buy it if you have naturally fine or thin hair—it transformed not only my thinning and fallout, but also my natural hair texture/thickness (or lack thereof). 

The first 3 photos were taken before or at the very beginning of my GRO Serum journey. The last 3 photos were taken in mid-August 2024 to about 2 weeks ago (showing progress after consistent use of 3 to 4 months using Vegamour’s serum). 

Thank you, Vegamour!

title: This really works!!
body:
I’ve been using the Gro serum for over 6 mos now and have noticed a dramatic decrease in shedding and at the 6 mos point I am also noticing the very beginning of regrowth. 
It definitely takes patience and very consistent use to experience the full effects of the Gro serum.  So, I encourage others to stick with it and realize that human hair does not grow “fast.”  To eliminate shedding is very important and then give your body time to regrow hair. This is a great product and really does work.

title: Great product!
body: I started using this in September of 2022 and by January I noticed a significant difference in my patches of thin hair near my part and my hairline at my forehead. I did use the GRO shampoo and conditioner with it, but not always. I alternated it with other brands. I still use this nightly and would say it has definitely given me results in the long term, but if I get really stressed it will thin again in the same spots so I feel like I have to start over. So it’s not necessarily preventing it from thinning but definitely helps it grow back. Would recommend.  I need do take updated pictures to show what it looks like now in September of 2024.

title: Didn't think it would work...
body:
I'm so glad they're proving me wrong.  I'm old, 63, been losing my hair to stress for the past 10 years to the point you can see my scalp in the sun.  Cannot part my hair either.  

Six months in with Vegamour and, though its not a full head of hair, it is so much more better than it was.  I don't trust chemicals and I heavily color my hair.  My daughter is a colorist and she finally asked me last week what I'm doing because my crown has gotten so much more fuller.  Then she looked at the area on the top right near my forehead (yeah I'm so lucky its right where everyone can see), and she gasped!  She said, though it is still sparse, she can actually see more growth.  I can also feel it when I put my hands through my hair.  
I'd upload pictures but I'm old and don't take any, but I can attest this stuff works.  Be vigilant and use it daily.  It takes you a couple of weeks to be consistent, but once you do, don't give up.  It took six months for me to notice the difference.   The only time I don't is the two days following a having my hair colored.  It does not affect the color at all.

title: It really works!
body: It really works. I have always had a healthy amount of hair until 4 years ago when I began a journey of healing from ulcerative Colitis, an autoimmune disease that left me completely depleted of basic vitamins and minerals. My hair began to fall out so aggressively. I was also postpartum with my 3rd baby. Needless to say it was a harsh combination of circumstances but Vegamour worked! My hair loss slowed way down and I began to see little baby hairs growing with in the first two weeks of using it. My favorite part is that it’s topical. Given that I am on a healing journey and on a strict protocol I wanted to minimize any possible irritants to my digestive system so this hair serum was just what I needed. Loved to to the hype! So grateful!

title: It does really work
body:
I noticed in March my part was starting to get wider. I’ve now been using this serum on my hair every night before bed for about four months and I’ve noticed a huge difference! 

I also recommend getting your blood work done if your hair is thinning. I found out I was deficient in Vitamin D, which may have also been contributing to my issue. I think adding a vitamin D supplement  and using this serum every night is what led to my results. 

I definitely recommend this product! I’ve included pictures of my before and after.

title: seems to be working
body:
I got this to try to regrow hair in a scar on the top/back of my head. I had one of three hair transplants and decided not to continue those, so I've just been using an eye shadow-like coloring so you can't see the area. I would prefer more hair, though. I've used Vegamour most days for a little over a month. I've also used on my hairline, and the thinner temple area on my right side.

The scar is filling in. It's still sparse, but it seems smaller, and there's more hair around the scar, which makes for easier covering. My part area shows lots of new growth. I'm not sure if it's working at all on the right side temple area, but that may take longer to regrow. I should say I have also been using the BOOST red light therapy on my scar, so it could be the combination of red light and Vegamour. I started around the same time, but the new growth on my part would seem to indicate at least some of the scar area regrowth is from the Vegamour. I'm not treating my part with the red light.

My only concern is that there DOES seem to be some hormonal impact from the serum. Red clover affects female hormones, and I've noticed if I use too much, it seems to trigger the inflammation of hormonal imbalance. I'm not sure if it's too estrogenic, or just not the right type of estrogen my body prefers, but I get the same achy joints and breast tenderness as if I eat way too much tofu or take too many estrogenic herbs.

I know they say it's not hormonal, but given the red clover and my body's reaction, I don't see how it could be totally non-hormonal. Maybe I am extra sensitive to red clover in particular. I will use it for at least a couple months to see if I can get that scar to regrow more. I'm not sure I will be able to take this long term, as if I use even a little too much, my feet and knees really hurt. It's a fine line, and if I err on the side of perhaps too little, I do fine.

title: Reduces shedding - packaging is annoying
body:
Moving into peri (IYKYK) and it felt like I was shedding a lot more hair than I used to. I've also noticed thinning at my temples and along the hairline. I bought this in the hopes it would help with those things. I've used it for several months now and I can say it definitely reduces shedding - I went from feeling like I was losing clumps washing my hair to only seeing a few hairs in the shower. I'm not seeing new growth or filling in at the hairline, which is a bummer, but my hair does feel fuller and looks really good - lustrous and full-bodied. I haven't had issues with my hair being greasy or oily with this, and I have fairly oily skin/scalp. 

However, the bottles are annoying for multiple reasons. One, the serum basically has the consistency of water and it often runs into my face, ears, and neck, so that feels like a waste. Not sure what kind of applicator would be better but maybe something with a slower release. Two, as another reviewer mentioned, the dropper doesn't work to get all the serum out as you get to the end of the bottle, and it leaves a fair amount in the bottom of the bottle. I wind up shaking it out onto my hands and applying with my fingers, but again, the serum is like water, and it drips off my hands quicker than I can get it on my head. For the price, I really want all of what I paid for.

title: Thinning, fine hair
body:
I have fine hair that’s thinning. I’ve been using the product for almost two months.  I’m diligent about applying the product daily.  It feels that I  have some hair stumble of growing hair on the top of my head. 

It’s easy to use and doesn’t have any strange scents. It has a light, fresh scent that’s subtle. I do feel that my hair looks greasy the next day which is disappointing.  I feel that I need to wash my hair if I’m going out. This wasn’t what I expected, based on the description and  ads. 

As it hasn’t been three months yet, I’ll continue to use the growth product to see the results. l can’t wait to see what I notice at that time.  I wish that my hair didn’t look greasy the next day.  It’s definitely a product to try on your thinning hair.

title: Life-Changing
body:
After a bout of COVID in September '23, I began experiencing rapid hair loss and shedding.
I think I cried more in those few months than I ever have.
The distress of my hair falling out in my hands and my visible scalp made me feel hopeless, and I did not want to be seen by other people.
After checking my bloodwork, my doctors gave me the option of oral Minoxidil (Rogaine) to be taken indefinitely.
I decided to try Vegamour first, and I'm so glad I did.
Not only does the GRO serum accelerate my hair growth, but also their shampoo and conditioner immediately and visibly thickens and plumps my hair.
Their add-on products like the leave-in conditioner make my hair less tangled and more soft and manageable b/t washing.
I am quite sensitive to perfumes and fragrances, and the Vegamour products do NOT give me a headache.
I would encourage anyone who is experiencing symptoms like mine to try Vegamour.
It's now March '24, my hair has completely stopped falling out, I have about 2" of hair re-growth, and finally I'm able to run my fingers through my hair again.

title: Look no further, this is your hair savior.
body:
I started experiencing increased hair shedding in December of 2023. I have Thyroid disease, and thought it was attributed to that.  My bloodwork showed normal levels, except for my stress levels. My dermatologist diagnosed me with telogen effluvium, which is very common (and most common in women.) it’s the body’s autoimmune response to a stressful event, similar to the hair loss effects of post partum. She wanted to put me on minoxidil, but I was hesitant due to negative side effects. 

I did A few weeks of research and decided to take a chance and order the 3-pack gro+ serum, along with the shampoo. 

When I TELL you at what a difference it’s made, it really has. Before I was Experiencing clumps of hair coming out of the shower, when I brushed. Hair was limp and lifeless. I’d try to style it to conceal thin areas, and really just lost all around confidence. Ladies, our hair is our THING, so I know Your pain.  I consistently Use the serum every other day, and use the shampoo once a week. I maybe Have 5-6 strands that fall out when I  shower, compared to the clumps that were falling out some months ago. Consistency and patience is key, so don’t give up. 

Vegamour has been an absolute life saver, and I’m a customer for life!

title: I am continuing with this product
body: This is the second review I've submitted - it is an update. I started with the gummies alone. After about 2-3 months I noticed noticeably less hair in the shower, and what seemed like more growth in my hair. So, I added the serum that goes directly on the head at that point. After about 1 month of adding the serum, I noticed my hair getting a lot fuller, with less and less hair in the shower. I use the products every single day. It's been about 6 months now (at first just the gummies and then both gummies and serum), and my hair is absolutely continuing to improve. Less shedding, more growth, more fullness, and it's crazy but my hair is also getting longer. My intuition tells me that it's 75% because of the serum, and 25% because of the gummies, but that's just a subjective feeling and I'm not willing to risk stopping either one of them. Who knows, the improvement could be a synergistic result of using both. I am sticking with both of these products. I am very pleased with the results.

title: Beyond thrilled!
body: I’m a 57 YO post menopausal woman with Hashimoto’s.  I was getting concerned about the amount of hair that was coming out in the shower. It was alarming! I started minoxidil, but didn’t like the thought of these chemicals on my scalp. I stumbled upon Vegamour, and I’m so glad I did! It aligns with my values as a vegan, and I love that it is a clean, cruelty free product. I started using Vegamour on November 4, 2023 and have not skipped a single treatment. At just a couple of weeks in, I noticed much less shedding, and now at nearly 90 days in, my hair has done a 180 degree change in health and appearance. My front bald spots are filling in, and my hair looks terrific! I’ve never loved my hair, but it now looks as good as it ever has. I have super fine hair that is now past my shoulders. Before Vegamour, it was growing slowly, and now it is growing like crazy! I apply it at night, and have experienced zero greasiness the next day, and I’m fine to keep my normal twice a week shampooing.  I tried to get “before” pictures, but couldn’t get the right angle. My coworkers confirm that my hair is looking great these days. I plan to be a lifelong customer, but I do wish it were a little more affordable.

title: Improved scalp health SO much. Life-changing!
body:
I think I've seen *some* filling in near my temples and maybe near my widow's peak but can't be completely sure. The hair thinning might have been in my head or due to parting differently, getting layers/cutting off like 12 inches over the last year, BUT I used to have endless scalp issues for almost a decade. Flaking, irritation, insane oiliness and itchiness to the point that it was embarrassing to be in public. I had to wash my hair every day and tried so many different products that would only leave me with scabs (TMI, sorry) from how much I itched. My dermatologist offered absolutely zero help, but using Vegamour shampoo and conditioner plus this serum has fixed everything.

Now I can go a few days without washing like I prefer to with the shampoo and conditioner set. I noticed an almost immediate difference in the health of my scalp. I don't itch whatsoever since I started using this either - I can't believe how much it's changed my life. I'm on my second bottle of serum and second set of shampoo and conditioner. I've even been able to use a purple shampoo with no irritation while using this stuff. Going to try every product probably and I'm pretty confident the lessened irritation will help me get some thickness back in the long run!

title: Lifesaver!
body:
I've been using Vegamour for nearly 2 years and I'm in awe.
I have naturally curly/wavy hair and have been shedding my whole life. After the first baby my hair took a dive and I couldn't grow it out for 2 years. As soon as I started with Vegamour I noticed that I stopped shedding - even in the shower - and the results persisted. Then my hair started growing again, so now I finally have it long!
I recently had my second child and I was able to use Vegamour throughout the pregnancy because the ingredients were safe to use. While it didn't prevent post-partum hair loss (the reasons are hormonal so nothing can stop it), it helped tremendously with the recovery! I had new hairs within a month and shedding has already decreased dramatically.
I have converted multiple friends to using this product and I swear by it. Please don't ever go out of business ❤️

title: Finishing Bottle 2
body: Currently finishing bottle two and ordered another bottle. I like that the formula is not heavy or greasy and the smell is nice. My hair is filling in, but I’ve also been making a lot of other changes, so I can’t really speak on this product alone. I would definitely say that adding it to your regimen could be worth it though and that if you are struggling with hair thinning or hair loss, you shouldn’t be putting all of your faith in a miracle or single product anyway. I also like the scalp detox sample my subscription growth serum came with. I definitely feel like it helped clean and calm my scalp. I was suffering with major hair loss and found out that it was from a major iron and B12 deficiency after a UC flare and taking anti-depressants for the first time (which I ended up having an allergic reaction to). I used this in conjunction with changing my shampoo/conditioner, hairbands, and wash frequency, adding supplements into my routine, and eliminating almost all soda and artificial sugars. I had long curly hair and was used to seeing a lot come out in the shower, but then it reallyyyyy started coming out. And the same amount would come out even if I washed two days in a row. I started avoiding washing my hair because it would just make me cry. My hair line began to thin majorly to the point where I was trying to think of how I could cover it up at work while still being in dress code. I had to cut my hair and wear it in a low ponytail with satin scrunches in the hopes that it would help take off some of the pressure. I loved wearing my hair down and big and wild, but would only do so when at home and on the weekends because I didn’t want anyone to see how my pale scalp began to show in the back. That was a little two months ago and I’m seeing big improvement!!! I’m hoping to be back to where I was in another month and maybe better another 3.

title: Caveat Emptor
body: All I can say is, put simply...If you DO NOT "literally" want your hair to be too thick to part (your hair), use something else! Honestly, I  should have used something exclusively for growth! Why? Any time your hair is growing it has to be healthy, so I should have found something like that. THIS...VEGAMOUR!! It works too fast for you to say, "I don't want it this full."  In fact, I started to give it 4stars, but that would not have been fair! Again, I can deal with the length (because you can always cut it),  and your hair can never be too healthy...But the volume is too much (work) to handle. YOU'VE BEEN GIVEN A HEADS UP! -DR. Keisha Jones

title: Seeing Results
body: I’ve been using the Vegamour GRO hair serum for 3 months now and I’ve seen a big difference in my hair growth. While I still notice hair shedding I have begun to see an increase in my hair density and lots of new hair growth which is covering up a lot of thinning spots around my edges specifically. Due to the results I decided to try the rest of the system including the gummies and shampoo and conditioner. I will say one bottle doesn’t last me a month. I probably use two in a month because I use it in many areas on my scalp. I haven’t experienced any flare ups on my skin or dandruff which I usually experience with other hair growth drops. It’s water based so it appears to be well absorbed and non greasy so I can put it daily as instructed.

title: Give it time
body: I have been using the serum faithfully every night since January of this year. It did take longer than 3 months to tell a difference for me. Shedding was the first thing to slow down and then around month 5 I was noticing little sprouts of new hair. It’s very light and smells great!  I very much wish I would have kept pictures but honestly I was so devastated that I would delete instantly. Between the serum, shampoo/conditioner, scalp detox 2x a week and honestly taking good care of myself again my hair is looking and feeling so much better. I do recommend these products but just know results are different for everyone and to be kind and patient with yourself and the process!

title: Great product! Terrible company/ customer service!
body:
Great product, and in my experience has shown quick results. With that, I ordered originally from a third party to “try” the product, and again saw very quick results. 
Ordered a $400+ order directly from the company as a result. Yay! Except…this order was then cancelled without notification, and when I “messaged” customer service I then invested a substantial amount of time and energy rectifying the situation. Additionally, this company deals primarily with women’s hair loss…In my opinion that is a quite sensitive subject. I did not have a “sensitive” experience. I had a scripted experience. And they claimed there was only “1” possible way to ship their product. So, even though they were directly responsible for all of the happenings, there was “no way” to honor the original delivery date.
I guess in the grand scheme of hair loss one would think that a company promoting hair growth would be a bit more sensitive.

body: First of all, I’d like to say most serums leave my hair feeling oily and like I need to wash it daily. Not this one! title: Really makes my hair grow.
body:
My hair was so bad after menopause. I used a variety of things. I was using  5% Minoxidil at night and then rotating Bradceuticals Hair Follicle & Adipose Stem Cell Serum with Vegamour every other morningy. My hair grew in thick and fast. I had to color my hair every 2 weeks. It was like hair I'd had in my 20s.

I decided to go off the Vegamour and just continue with the Minoxidil at night and the Bradceuticals in the morning. My hair wasn't falling out, but it wasn't growing. I started coloring my hair every 4-5 weeks. That proved to me that Vegamour really works.

title: Post-Partem Hair Regrowth!
body:
I NEVER leave reviews on anything. But I had to review this item because I want to help other moms who struggled with hair loss & thinning after pregnancy and/or birth.  Look at my photo transformation. I  am sooo happy!! 

It’s slow progress, but it’s progress. This has taken about 6 months. I have super thin hair to begin with so it was very noticable when I started thinning. Yes, this makes your hair a little greasy looking (although it smells amazing!) but just put the serum in at night and shower in the morning or put on a headband the next dag. A little stickiness is worth these results.

title: Absolutely helps with hair loss.
body:
After a difficult bout with Covid last summer I experienced severe hair loss for about two months straight. It was horrifying and so sad. I began the gro serum about 4-5 months ago and from my picture you can actually see about 4-5” of regrowth. It’s in an awkward phase but I’ll take it! I instantly started seeing less shedding immediately after starting it. It did take about three months in to really see it was making a difference.
The only reason I’m not giving 5 stars is I do think it makes my hair dirtier quicker… but really nothing severe. For example in the past I used to be able to go 5 days without washing and while using this serum I can only go 4 days max.

title: Former skeptic--This stuff is the Real deal
body: I am in my sixties, with curly 3B brown-graying hair.  For more than two years, my hair was falling out in larger and larger amounts to the point that the thinning was noticable to everyone.  I was horrified.  My hair is part of my identity!  I went to the dermatologist and was treated with various topical shampoos and serums.  Nothing made any difference.  I told my sister how much my hair loss bothered me and she bought me some Vegamour shampoo, conditioner, and the GRO serum.  She had heard about it through her work as a massage therapist at a top health spa.  I was skeptical because nothing else had made any difference.  But I gave it a try and was really good about putting the serum on almost every night.  Lo and behold, I began noticing tiny hairs coming out along my hairline and I could tell my hair was getting thicker.  Fallout dropped dramatically.  Seriously, whatever this stuff is I am hooked.  I regret that I did not take any before pictures.  But the change has been real.  I recently returned to work in an office I left 9 months ago and I have had people ask what I've done differently with my hair.  The style is the same.  There is just more volume.  I tell everyone what has made the difference.  A huge thanks to Vegamour!

body:

title: It’s working!
body: Postpartum hair loss after my second pregnancy was highly disconcerting. Lots of internet searching, lots of products with big promises - I was hesitant to spend the money on Gro, knowing it would be several months before I could confirm any positive benefit. Add to that my concern about using any extra products on my body while nursing my baby. The all natural ingredients and other user testimonials brought me to try this out. While I didn’t take before and after photos and my hair 4-5 months into fairly regular use of Gro isn’t night and day, I can confirm it IS  working so I’ll be sticking with it. I started using it on the front first as that was what was bothering me most and I started to see all the new baby hairs coming in. This allowed me confirm it was the Gro product and not the supplements I was taking from another company. I then started focusing on the back. Sure enough I can now see all the new growth popping up. It’s working for me. If you’re reading this and decide to try, I hope it works for you too!

title: 5 months using for Alopecia Areata
body: I have been using Vegamour for 5 months for Alopecia Areata and I have seen hair growing back. I’m also doing steroids injections and the capillus laser cap, so not sure if the serum alone works.  I do see that my hair is stronger and fuller looking. I was a blonde for a decade and my hair was very fragile, and there has been less breakage since using it. I like that it has no fragrance in it or oils, so I use it everyday. My negative thoughts on the product are: if you have any type of inflammation or sensitivity on your scalp, the alcohol in the serum will burn a little. The liquid tend to run down your face or back of your head, so it doesn’t stay in place. The bottle is too small for the price and when is almost done the pump doesn’t get the reminder of the serum. Also, the bottles have less amount than it should which is annoying. The pump of the serum is made of glass which has broken for me twice; I wish it was made of plastic. title: Super excited!
body: I'm always a sceptic..esp when it comes to pricey products, unfamiliar to me, promoting mind-blowing results. Well, it's been 2 total months and wow..I'm so happy! Diligence & patience when it comes to hair. I was noticing a tremendous amount of hair in my drain  starting 9 months ago.. Having had mega chemo 20 yrs ago, the nightmare of hair falling out in clumps triggers my past. However, in present, I contributed this to age, stress and lack of hormones. I changed my supplements and shampoo to start, knowing that realistically, hair takes 6 months to flourish. Minimal change noticed..so this product pops up on FB, and I order the 3-pack serum. It's really working, seriously! I apply it every night, religiously, which takes me 10 mins. I am seeing results every day.. The new hair coming in is making existing hair stick up a bit..but proof that it's working! I'm realistically giving this til May 2023 to see my end result... I remain hopeful & optimistic!

title: My hair shedding diminished by 75%
body:
Sometimes I cannot believe how I got by on my hair routine without Vegamour. I saw ads and truly felt like nothing would work for me. I got depressed because I was loosing 100+ hairs a day. People say that it is average but with my fine hair that was a whole lot of hair loss. I was the girl that counted how many hairs would fall out before and after showering just to see if I have excessive hair loss. 
After a week of using Vegamour, I started seeing DRAMATIC less hair loss. I started counting my hairs again after noticing a significant reduction of hair mass in my brush. I now only loose about 25-30 hairs throughout the day. Sometimes I want to cry at how happy I am with Vegamour. Just try it. It's worth the money.

title: Dissapointed
body: I'm really disappointed in this product. First of all, it's not explicitly clear in the product description that users need to buy multiple products to see any kind of result.  The bottle is tiny - I have been using it sparingly only on the front parts of my scalp for 5 days now and the bottle is already 25% empty. The product is very expensive and I was disappointed to learn that if I don't buy a second and third product, I will have spent a significant amount of money and time for zero results. The product should be sold in a bottle three times this size and priced accordingly, or else it should be made clear that buying one product only is useless. Secondly, I think those contemplating buying this product should know that it does leave your hair looking greasy and crusty (at least it did for me, despite only using it sparingly). I don't usually write reviews but wanted to share my experience so that others aren't deceived like I was.

title: Some improvements
body:
I’ve been using the serum nightly for three months. 
So far, here are my take-aways! 

Pros: 
*I do see some new baby hairs growing in around my temples (the main area I’ve been treating.)
*serum is not greasy or oily, absorbs clean over night. 

Cons:
*one bottle does NOT last me a full month. I haven’t been using it on my whole head (mostly just spot treating my thinning temples and crown), and still only get about 3 weeks/bottle which makes it pretty expensive to restock. I wish the bottles came in bigger sizes, at the very least. 
*no discernible difference in shedding yet, which is something I’d hoped for. I shed a LOT. 

Summary - I’m going to continue to use the serum, because I do think it’s causing some new hair growth, but I would be happier if the price would go down and the bottle size would go up! 
I will update my review in 3 more months! 

Make sure you take good “before” pics!

title: It’s works -92days result
body: Hello , so I will share my 92 days experience with Vegamour - pink bottles and 3 months gummies :) In these 92 days I used four bottles because I need them to grow everywhere. So in both photos, I haven’t washed my hair for 2-4 days to better see the difference . My story is I was vaccinated as a teenager and I had a very bad experience ( it weakened my immunity and I was very tired) some health problems came immediately and some later . So I try everything , but I was looking for something natural what will help me and I will be able to use it even if I was pregnant ( no hormones or drugs ).I know that natural things need time and patience . My experience with the first bottle of vegamour was that the first month my hair fell out more so I looked worse than in the first picture but only in some places . I think that the weakest hair fell out . My experience with second bottle was good . My hair changed in quality and was stronger and they began to fall out less . Bottle number 3 and 4 very good experience. I am satisfied . I'm looking forward to seeing the change after one year. I decided to share a bit of my story because I think it's time to stop silencing people . Vegamour I’m happy that I find you .

title: It really works!!
body: I had weave extensions in for about3 months before I realized how much more hair I was losing.  I really panicked and started trying all kinds of products to bring my hair back since the sides of my head where the extensions were attached were showing significant loss. I even tried rogaine for about 1 week but panicked about the potential hair loss side effects. I decided to try this product. I bought the 3 pack and have been using it for over 1 month. My only complaint is that the bottles are small and one bottle is not enough for the whole month. I still see the some patching but while getting a hair cut I saw a ton of baby hair in that area.. I was so excited that I decide write a review! I really think this product will help restore the hair follicles that were  damaged during the hair extensions period! 🤞🏻🙏🏼. As far as hair loss… it’s remained about the same. I can’t wait to see the improvements after a full 3 months!i will continue to buy this product. I have a really good feeling about it! I think it a bit pricey but it’s worth it if it works right!! It’s worth noting that I also take vitamins for hair.  Unfortunately I haven’t taken any photos.

title: Mixed results, but mostly negative
body:
So let me just start by saying how excited I was to try this serum. I’ve seen the ads for months and months and finally decided to give it a try after dealing with hair shedding and thinning for two years. I thought what the heck, it can’t make it worse right? WRONG! The shedding actually increased by month three , with daily use of the serum as directed. It’s gotten to the point where the shedding is so bad that I have to wipe up the floor in my bathroom after every time I wash, blow dry, or even brush my hair.

 When I contacted customer service they gave me this long winded explanation how this is my old hair falling out to make room for the beautiful new hair to grow in. Well, news flash it is not growing in at the same rate it’s falling out! There is no way I can replace all the hair on my head in a matter of 2 or even 3 months. It takes years to reach a certain length!

Needless to say, I am super disappointed and disheartened. Back to square one. Again.

Their cancellation process is also a joke. You have to call in. Are you serious?! Who does that anymore?

For the little bit of positive in this product: I will say I did see some new hair growth , very fine wisps, in areas which were sparse. But overall the extreme shedding that has not stopped is just not worth this new growth. My hair looks a lot thinner now than when I first started the treatment three months ago.

Also for those of you reading their “clinical double blinded trial” claims. Read the fine print a bit closer: the results were based on an extremely small samples. Just 19 participants for one of the studies. Anyone who has taken statistics should know the sample size needs to be at least in the high 20s for it to be representative of the larger population.

I am skeptical how well this truly works, many of the positive reviews are left by people who received the product for free. Just saying…..

title: Before and after 2 bottles for 3 months.
body:
Just here to show my before and after photos, two bottles and three months. I wash my hair 3-4 times weekly give or take. I put it on my whole head after the shower. Blonde fine hair, still needs allot of tlc. 

As far as I know this is due in part by this serum. That or it’s just the naturally way the body is repairing. 

But I would recommend to anyone with hair loss, and I do recommend on a regular basis to my clients with hair loss in my salon. An overwhelming amount of woman have hair loss. And have tried many things.

title: On my 3rd bottle
body:
I have had a fair amount of hair loss, I lost about half of my hair due to vitamin deficiencies, anemia, stress, and overall lack of protein in my diet. I lost around half of my hair in the span of like a month or two. And I promise this stuff is the one product I found that actually works. I didn’t want to use minoxidil, that was kind of going to be my last resort. As well as getting a wig. But once I started using this product my hair stopped falling out, and started to grow back, and honestly grows faster than before. After about the first bottle I started to notice little hairs about a quarter inch long around my face. And now that I’m on my third bottle the hairs are about 3 inches long and stand up on end so I can see so many. I have so much regrowth it’s crazy. 

At the very least, I know that my hair is growing a lot faster. Even my coworkers have said that my hair just randomly got way longer. So I recommend this product to a lot of my clients. I am a hairstylist. So if you’re dealing with hair loss this would be the first product I would recommend and honestly the only one other than vitamins. Good luck!

I also added the bondi boost hair grow shampoo to the mix. Because these shampoo and conditioner duos are very expensive for small amounts. I am willing to pay for the groceries them, but I’m not willing to pay that much money for the shampoo and conditioner. I wish it was a little bit more affordable. The drops are worth it, the shampoos should be no more than $20 apiece

title: Wow wow wow!!!
body: If the photos don’t show you how amazing this stuff is, I don’t know what will. I’ve been using this after my hair started falling out from an undiagnosed autoimmune disease. I didn’t notice the hair loss at first but then one day, BAM! I was shedding like crazy and the moment it hit me was when I had to start investing in ball caps to hide my utter embarrassment. I went out to a theme park with my daughter one day and forgot a hat but learned how to hide the bald spots and thinning well will volumizing shampoo, foam, hairspray… but then it rained and my daughter’s face said it all. I wanted to cry so we ran to the nearest souvenir shop and I paid a stupid amount of money for a cap I never wore again. Not to mention the hundreds of dollars a month I spent on hair products, vitamins, gummies… I tried IT ALL! I even went to a dermatologist and was given minoxidil but you can’t stay on that forever.  What I love about this product is that I can go for days not using it and I don’t notice a severe difference in shedding. I’m fact, I would lose clumps of hair daily (200- 250 strands… and yes I counted) and now maybe 50?  I love this stuff so much that I even bought it for my mom and sister who also suffer from hair loss due to the same autoimmune disease. Thank you Vegamour for changing my life and making me more confident on a daily basis!! I’m back with my hairstylist and have even got highlights! Never thought that day would come :)

title: I think it works
body:
So I was in kind of a desperate place a while back because I was extremely vitamin deficient, and highly anemic. And I didn’t know at the time what was causing my hair loss. Until of course I went to the doctor, but when I was in a very desperate state I wanted to turn to about anything. I did decide to land on this product because it had a lot of reviews. I’ve been using it for almost 3 months, and I do see new growth, I know for a fact my hair is growing back. I don’t know if it’s due to the fact that I took care of my vitamin deficiency. Or due to the fact that I’m using this, maybe it’s the combination of both. If I knew for a fact that this product was The source of my new hair growth I would give it five stars, but I don’t know if it’s just a coincidence. But I would say if you’re having hair loss issues, it could be for multiple reasons. But this is a decent product to turn to to try. Because if it doesn’t work for you you really didn’t lose that much money. And as far as places taking advantage of women feeling like they’re losing hair, I don’t think this is one of them Because I do think to an extent that this product does work. If you’re at a point where you need to try something for hair loss, I would use the growth serum. I would not use the minoxidil treatment until you are literally at your last straw. And nothing else has worked for you. Good luck ladies.

Also the consistency is great, it does not make your hair greasy at all. It does not make you have to wash your hair any earlier, it has a very very light scent that I don’t mind at all. When it’s wash day as soon as I get out of the shower while my hair is still wet I apply the product to my whole scalp. And then between wash days I apply the product every day only on my hairline. Because it is expensive and I use it very sparingly, mainly focusing on the hairline.
I’m going to continue using it, I intend on posting pictures later because I had taken one picture three months ago, and I took one picture today. And then I’ll take one picture probably three months from now.

title: Amazing! Hair loss from Covid and weight loss.
body:
I experienced a loss of about 1/4th  of my hair following a second bout of covid and some relatively significant weight loss. I have always had very thick hair, and the amount that I was losing in the shower was actually kind of horrific. After a week or two of using this product the hair loss slowed a great deal, and has continued to do so. I have been using this product since February, and I have a crazy amount of hair growth. I am now experiencing the lovely baby hairs that are hard to manage, but I am so thankful for them! 

I should also add that my husband is now using the product and seeing hair growth in his receding hair line. That was an unexpected bonus- we were just trying to keep the hair that he had left haha.

title: Okay, but didn’t deliver in the way I’d hoped
body: I used Vegamour‘s GRO hair serum for three months I immediately noticed a difference in the texture of my hair.  While using the serum every day my hair felt and indeed looked somewhat fuller. However no new hair growth ever happened and indeed when I ran out of the serum and stopped using it within a couple of days the texture of my hair went back to normal and lost whatever benefit I was getting by using it daily. In other words the GRO  serum seemed to definitely provide a benefit while I was using it, but there was nothing lasting. And as I said no hair grew. This is a very expensive product for me and I can’t afford to use something on a regular basis that costs this much and has no lastin results. I was hoping that it would help new hair growth  but it did not.

title: Review after 1 year
body: I've been using Vegamour Hair serum for 1 year today. It has definitely helped me with areas that I saw hair loss but I will say it takes time to see results. In about 3 months I started to see more hair growth in certain areas. I would also recommend the subscription to get a discount, and I also realized recently that I had a bunch of rewards so make sure to check those because you can apply that to your subscriptions. I had almost $100 in rewards that I didn't know I had. The reason I rate this product a 4 and not a 5 is because although it has helped my hair grow in certain areas it ONLY works on certain areas where you apply the serum. I think if you're someone that struggles with thin hair like myself you need to do more than the serum. Like Biotin, Collagen, Hair Masks, Hair Treatments, reduce the amount of time you apply heat to your hair, diet, vitamins, etc. It's a combined effort that helps not just one serum.

title: Post Covid hair loss?? Menopause?? Worry no more! This works well!
body:
After Covid I lost about 90% of the density in my hair and it was so thin. It would fall out several times daily just by itself not to mention all that came out when brushed it. I started having major panic attacks due to the trauma.

I bought vegamour , as a “last chance” to find a way to grow it and without harsh chemicals .

I have been using “religiously” every day for about 6 months now and my hair has not only grown thicker and softer but the shedding and hair loss completely stopped by month 2 ! I would lose massive amounts of hair daily and I thought I was going to go bald! 

Hair started to “noticeably” grow in about a week or 2 and I had little spikey hair as it grew out for a while. That was new! Haha. Pun intended.

I’m so grateful for this product! Super easy to use. The ONLY suggestion I would have is BE CAREFUL not to let the dropper fall, it’s glass and I have broke 2 already. I think it should be a little thicker. 

I do think it’s a bit pricey BUT it works!! So to me, I am worth the investment! 

Pic are out of order but one showing my hair in bun was how thick my hair used to be and as you can see with photo of hair in side face photo, it’s much thinner however you can see more hair there was in the 2 side face photos that span about 3 month difference.

Thank you for this product! I’ll be a continued customer!

title: It really works!
body: I have been struggling with hair loss for 18 mo (so it wasn’t seasonal shedding) plus breakage after a perm at a salon. I am in peri menopause only last few months, but possible it was hormone related. I have tried shampoos, changing salon color products (I never used box dye), co washing (made my hair stink), washing less often, various supplements, and a couple natural oils. Some did help the texture and condition but my hair continued to come out in clumps when I washed it plus whatever fell out when just using a wide tooth comb and starting at bottom and working up. My hair had been to mid back but was now at my shoulders. I tried getting halo extensions but my thin hair wasn’t hiding it well. I was out of money to spend on it. I was counting hairs that fell out when I washed- over 150 each time. I had to wash hair in sink instead of tub as I would have hair all over me. Finally I asked my bf to buy me this. After a couple weeks I saw no more clumps, after about a month, I was noticing that there was less hair to clean off the sink after combing and the stopper didn’t have as much hair in it. I started washing it in the tub again and almost cried with joy when I counted only 15 hairs! I now have a fringe of hair along my hairline about 2 inches long. I’ll continue to use this. Btw I only use it after I wash my hair once or twice a week. 2 droppers, massage in, let dry.

title: Not a Solution for Alopecia!!!
body: If you have AGA (female or male pattern hair loss) or any AA, this stuff will do nothing for you except waste your money and time. I wasted 8 months on this stuff and wish I could take it back. This will only work for TE events (and even then, your hair will grow back once you fix the underlying stressor/issue). Go see a dermatologist and/or endocrinologist and get a diagnosis and real treatment.

Your products work and you have a lifetime customer! I'd love to see some styling products added to this line.

title: Making the impossible possible
body:
I'm not sure if I ever left a review on a product from an online shop, but this one needs to find it's way out there :)
I was suffering from hair loss for over 9 month, have prescribed cortison and minoxidyl and have been going through a rollercoaster of shedding and short-term "healing" but nothing really helped.

title: The GRO Hair Serum Saved My Hair
body:
I have been using the GRO Hair Serum for 3 months now and it is the most effective product I have ever used. 

I have been waiting to review this product until now because I wanted to see if it could change my hair when all of the other products I tired couldn't. In the past and more recently I have been diagnosed with PCOS, Hypothyroidism, suspected SIBO and when I came off the hormonal birth control pill 7 months ago, all of my hair started to fall out. 

I was devastated and worried that it would get worse, but then I found this serum! I apply it every night on wet or dry hair and massage it in, it smells great and doesn't leave any residue or make my hair look greasy in the morning if applied on dry hair. 

I would highly recommend this product, especially if you are dealing with hormonal issues or an autoimmune disease.

title: It truly works!
body:
I bought this product when I realized I was having post COVID hair loss. I wanted a product that wouldn't be something I'd have to do for life and had solid reviews. This was the best product I found.

I'm 6 weeks in now. My hair loss slowed after about 3 weeks and has continued to slow since then. It's almost normal now. I have a MILLION baby hairs growing in. I cannot tell you what a relief it is after losing half of my hair. I was terrified it would be permanent and am greatly relieved it doesn't seem to be.

No only has the hair loss slowed dramatically and I have a million baby hairs, I cut my hair to hide the hair loss and my hair is growing like a weed! I was sad to cut 6 inches off my hair because I had worked so hard to grow it long. It's pretty darn exciting to see my hair growing so quickly.

I definitely think it’s filled in my areas of concern while overall accelerated my hair growth past a length I’ve struggled to get it to for a while. Unfortunately I don’t think it made a huge difference in my amount of shedding. It definitely doesn’t make your hair greasy which was something I was worried about. It’s not cheap but I think the pack is worth grabbing when a discount comes around and I do overall recommend trying it for 3+ months.

title: Vegamour vs. Rogaine
body: I used Rogaine for about 6 months total prior to switching to Vegamour. I wanted to stop the Rogaine because it was changing my hair texture and making me grow facial hair. I switched to Vegamour and used it for 4-5 months. I didn't notice any significant changes. More importantly, I found that Vegamour does NOT stop hair shedding. It will take about 3 to 4 months for shedding to start again after stopping Rogaine. However, I was hoping that the use of Vegamour would prevent the shedding. It did not. My hair shedding is once again excessive. I would not recommend this for anyone with hair shedding issues. It may work better for those with thin hair looking to increase growth or fill in spots. I will, unfortunately, be going back to Rogaine.

body: I'm on my 4th month of the serum. I was a bit skeptical, and lost hair the first month, but that was the "hair phase." Month two, there was way less hair in the shower and on my hair brush, and I could see filling in around the hairline. I added the shampoo/conditioner. Month three there was virtually NO hair in the tub...not to mention my hairdresser commented that my hair looked healthy, thicker and she could see new growth! I see her every 10 weeks, so this was her being honest. I couldn't be happier and I'm about to do the subscription now that I have seen the proof, and adding the pillowcase and foam. Thank you for an "honest" product that does what it says it will do. Patience and consistency is key. It can get expensive, but join the Rewards program and watch for specials, which they have all the time, and you'll save money.

title: Skeptically Optimistic

I had almost given up and was very seriously considering just shaving my whole head. I didnt think this could work on me since I had tried everything else under the sun to no avail. But suddenly I realize halfway through my second bottle im not shedding like I used to, and ive got baby hairs growing all over the front! My hair stylist even recommended bangs so that it doesn't look so out of place until those baby hairs grow out a bit more. I have a long way to go on my hair growth journey but for now im crossing my fingers, applying daily, and hoping this isn't a fluke!

title: It works!!!!
body:
I LOVE this product. As I hit my late thirties I started to notice a drastic reduction in the fullness of my hair. I have curly/wavy hair that is very fine. It was very upsetting that I was beginning to lose my hair so rapidly; I did not want to use any chemicals or take any supplements to remedy the problem. 

I found an ad through social media for this hair serum. I decided to give it a chance based on the positive reviews but did not have any major expectation. Boy was I wrong! I have been using this hair serum for 10 months now. I apply it every day as directed. Recently I started skipping the weekends but I apply it religiously throughout the week. It has doubled my hair volume since I started using it and now, all the bare spots in my scalp that I started getting last year are now filled in. My hair has returned to how it used to be in my 20s. I think it is the healthiest it has ever been.

If you are looking for something non-harsh or chemical based to treat your hair loss, you should definitely give this a try. I have no regrets and I am a life long customer!

title: OMG this works!!
body:
For the past few years I had noticed my hair was thinner, then I started getting a very thin spot on the back of my head where my part is, and then my hair started shedding like crazy in 2020. I actually started avoiding washing my hair or brushing it because so much was coming out in the shower, or on my hair brush. I was to the point of tears so many times. I had my hormones checked and thyroid checked and it wasn’t that. I took biotin and a few other hair regrow that supplements which didn’t work. I was looking into all sorts of options when I stumbled upon this product on Instagram and thank goodness I did!! Within about 3 months the shedding had gotten way better and by about 6 months the shedding had stopped!!! In addition to that the thinness on the sides of my head, my hairline and the back part of my hair are all much more dense and filled back in. I can’t believe this actually works because I was skeptical, but now I’m recommending it to anyone with hair issues. Give it time, but it really works!! 
However, this is important to note, one bottle does NOT last a month! I have the three month subscription and I always have to buy an extra one in between. Maybe if you are just spot treating one bottle would last a month, but if you want it to go over your whole head, or even just the tops and sides like I do, one bottle will not last a month. Even so, I still highly recommend this product, just be aware of the amount you’ll need.

The ONLY reason I didn’t give this product 5 stars is because the bottle is SO SMALL :( I go through it so quickly. For someone like me who has a lot of hair, this bottle just isn’t big enough for the cost in my opinion. Please PLEASE make bigger bottles of the GRO hair serum and the GRO scalp detoxifying serum!!**
Other than that, I am OBSESSED with these products! I have dry flaky scalp and the scalp detoxifying serum is literally the only thing I’ve found (after trying EVERYTHING under the sun) that ACTUALLY WORKS! Flake free baby! Also, my hair has been growing like crazy, and I haven’t been shedding as much either! I also bought the GRO lash and GRO brow serums and I cannot say enough good things! After trying Latisse for two months with ZERO RESULTS, I came across this on Instagram and I’m so glad I did! I have seen more results and longer lashes using the GRO lash serum in TWO WEEKS than I did using Latisse for two months! Love love LOOOOVE these products, absolutely, hands down, game changers!

title: Here’s a long one journey but with the best ending
body: This review is for the “skeptics” or the just came across this on Instagram and wants to confirm this is legit. So I am a 26 year old woman that had been suffering with hair loss since I was 16 years old. I had depleted all my avenues (so I thought) and began looking to a hair transplant. I had a biopsy done at 16 and was diagnosed with female pattern balding and was immediately thrown on spironolactone which was AWFUL and did nothing. After a year I stopped taking it and accepted this is what it would be ... I would just be bald by 30. I then looked into “toppers” however they would like your first born in order to pay for them and being 18 with little money that couldn’t happen and all the while I’m just losing my self confidence and tons of hair (two bald spots develop) I then heard about these “shots” to the scalp (that hurt like hell) that could help. So one year of that treatment (self paid thanks for nothing insurance) I have no results so once again I’m done and I’m scarred. I can’t even google hair loss solutions without crying and feeling terrible and lost. So like I said I started researching hair transplants and had no clue how I could pay for it but it was my “only solution” and then on day Vegamour pops up on my Instagram and I go read reviews because of course I’m skeptical and I liked what I read so I thought “what do I have to lose?” I promised myself I would give this a fair shot and that I did. In the first three months my hair grew five inches which usually takes me about TWO YEARS to do; however I wasn’t really seeing much improvement in my bald spots and thickness so after six months I chose to stop. During that two month period I noticed my hair had changed so much and I was losing more hair so I immediately ordered more hoping after another six months I would see a difference. Well I’m here one year later to tell you my hair hasn’t been this thick, this long, and this healthy since I was a teenager!!!! I’m gaining more and more confidence back daily by seeing my hair grow! I have these wild baby hairs all over that stand straight up but it’s 100% new growth. When I look into a mirror and no longer see my scalp I could honestly cry! This stuff has seriously changed my life and confidence so for that THANK YOU!!!!! And for those thinking about it DO IT! You will NOT regret it!!!!

title: actually works!
body:
My hair thinning really seemed to ramp up after having my children -- each pregnancy caused a TON of hair loss, and although I mostly recovered, I never really seemed to get it all back. However, the tipping point was right before my 40th birthday I noticed a significant amount of thinning on my temples and hairline, and a LOT of shedding / clogged shower drains. Yikes. I've been using the original GRO hair serum since September of 2020 and within 2 weeks of twice daily use my shedding was 1/10th of what it had been. After about 3 months I was noticing lots of new growth and my hairdresser even commented on the amount of new hair she was seeing. Impressive!!!

I cut down to one daily application after about 4 months but I am pretty generous and apply at least 2 full droppers to my problem spots. I recently just switched my subscription to the GRO+ formula and will report back if I notice a difference between the formulas. I love that the serum smells great, and is completely non-greasy -- I have baby fine hair and my hair gets weighed down with most products. I apply after washing and conditioning on towel-dried hair and I've never noticed any residue.

title: 1 month results!

I have to say that after about 3 weeks the shedding had significantly been reduced and I am so relieved. The serum is easy to use, doesn't make my hair or scalp greasy, and has a light, pleasant scent. After almost 2 months, I did notice what seems to be regrowth on the top of my head, so I am feeling pretty hopeful. I'm excited to see what my results will be after 3-6 months.

title: GRO Hair Serum
body:
I just ordered and received my product. I am 55 and have very straight fine hair. Due to hormonal changes my hair loss started a few years back, but it was never too bad to worry about using anything. In 2020, I guess due to high stress, and other factors my hair loss has gotten much worst than usual, to the point that I have bald patches. I am very upset and concerned about this and really hoping all the reviews online about this product is accurate and true, and if I consistently use this product I will see results within a few weeks and/or months! 

I have applied it to my hair a couple of times already. I was pleasantly suprised that the product is NOT greasy and did not leave my hair oily or greasy feeling. What I was not too happy about, was that there were no instructions in the box. I wasn't really sure when to apply, how much to apply. It would have been super nice, if they included a nice introduction, suggested frequency of use, amount of use, etc. Also the product is a little watery so when putting close to the edge, it does tend to pour down your face! I have taken some picture of my before, and after I finsih all 3 bottles, I will definitely post my results including pictures. Stay Tuned :)
