title: Too Early to Tell
body: I have tried literally everything over the years to combat hair loss from warring thyroid conditions - minoxidil - viviscal - EPO - chili pepper shampoo - various herbal concoctions - a "laser comb" - I will try anything. It is still too early to tell with this one, but I am hopeful. There does seem to be less fall out of longer "older" hair. The hair wad in the shower drain is about 1/3 of what it was a month ago. I appreciate that it doesn't smell strong, doesn't include starchy stuff to give you a false feeling of volume. I like that it's not in a drying alcohol base and it doesn't mess with my blood pressure like minoxidil. I would feel OK using it while pregnant or breastfeeding since it doesn't make me faint! There was no "dread shed" phase for me - women who struggle with this know what I am talking about. I do feel like I could start/stop using this without a nightmare on either end. However, it is a very expensive test run. I took advantage of a Black Friday sale to try this. I'll see how it's looking when I finish the second bottle, but it is really too expensive for most of us.

title: I think I'm in love.
body:
I have auto-immune diseases and have struggled with hair loss for over a dozen years now. I've tried so many supplements and other products, giving each multiple years to do their thing, but nothing has worked. I'm now at the point where I lose three massive (very alarming-looking) clumps just while washing my hair—and that isn't including daily shedding.
I wasn't going to get my hopes up with Vegamour, but I knew I had to at least try it.
However, after only 6 days of use, I was washing my hair and not one strand fell out. NOT. ONE. Yes, I stood there sobbing in the shower. Yes, I decided I was in love with Vegamour right then and there.
Once I calmed enough to think rationally, I wondered if maybe it was a fluke...but today, only three strands fell out while washing my hair.
I'm now incredibly excited to see where I'll be at those three- and- four-month marks.

title: So far so good!
body:
I have thick, wavy, dry hair and I stared noticing some thinning areas that I wanted to take care of. Right now, I'm about a month and a half into using the GRO Hair Serum. I haven't noticed any difference in extra growth/density in these areas. However, today I was casually brushing my fingers through my hair, which usually leads to a lot of shedding, but nothing! Overall my hair does have a healthier look, it feels softer, and has lost a lot of its usual frizz. I was a little skeptical that it's recommended to purchase 3 bottles of this stuff until I actually see results, but half way into it, I feel like I'm on track to getting the results I'm looking for! 

I plan to revisit this review as I get closer to month 3.

body: This serum helped my hair grows faster and thicker. Should give it a try if you’re experiencing hair loss

Some products don't even say how much ounces it contains. The links don't always jump to where they are supposed to, so frustrating to shop on this website. It needs serious update.

title: Love it....

title: I've been using the GRO
body: I've been using the GRO serum for 6 months now. I'm in my upper 40s and have experienced the typical thinning of hair and less growth. Since I started using the serum, I've noticed more fullness and less thinning around the front sides of the hair around my face. I've gotten some length back and hoping to see it go past the 'stopping' point that it seems to not want to grow beyond. But I am very happy to have more fullness! My hair also feels healthier, shinier, and more manageable. The serum is easy to use and is not greasy at all. I apply in the evening just before bedtime. I wash my hair every other day, and this makes no difference for that in between wash day on greasiness. I definitely recommend this product and looking forward to seeing the continued results!

title: no hair dropping in shower
body: Hair stopped dropping out in the shower after the 2nd week that I started using it. But I have to apply it on a daily basis for effect to be seen.

title: works amazingly!
body: I was a bit skeptical about this product, as I am about everything I see online but after doing my research on it, I decided to try it. I'd noticed very suddenly that I had multiple baldspots, hair was falling and thinning so I desperately wanted something that would work. this product is worth every penny! I was shocked at how quickly hair started growing back and bald spots started filling in! I have definitely stopped shedding hair as much as before and my hair is definitely more dense than it was before I started using this product. I'm so glad I tried the three month subscription because it really really does work! This product not only helped my hair regrow, but by doing so, it also boosted my confidence, which is priceless! Thank you Vegamour!

title: This stuff works
body: I have had thinking hair for years now and nothing I tried made any difference. I'd lose insane amounts of hair in the shower and you could see the start of balding spots on the back of my head. I've been using the serum consistently for a little over 3 months now and holy moly my hair is completely changed. It's thicker than it's ever been and it's starting to grow a lot longer. The best part (other than not having super thin hair at the roots) is even the long ends are full and thick, not tapered. Will be using this product for a very long time.

title: Life Saver — And It’s Still Early!
body: I used to have really thick hair but did not take care of it like I should have! With COVID especially and spending a lot of time at home, I found myself wearing it up in buns every single day, which is terrible for your hair. I noticed my hair was a lot thinner and I was starting to get bald spots with the largest one being on the back of my head. I purchased this serum about two months ago along with the GRO+ serum (prefer the standard GRO serum). It takes some time to form the habit of applying the serum regularly but once you get in a consistent routine, the results follow. I can visibly see growth of new hairs and it’s still early on! Can’t wait to continue using this product and seeing results.

title: Good results so far
body: I've been using the product for 7 weeks and have started to see my hair line become slightly more full. The baby hairs have grown at least 2 inches longer which is pretty great. I expect this to continue into month 3 and am looking forward to the results.

title: Amazing results
body: This is the second bottle I've purchased because I absolutely astonished by how much my hair had grown. I've noticed alot of baby hairs which are growing through quite healthily. The baldness is most parts has reduced quite a bit and although I'm through half this second bottle, I'm quite hopeful to see further improvements. The scent is quite pleasant and because this product is waterbased it quickly absorbs leaving no scent at all. Overall I am extremely happy with the product in itself however just a little downside is that its quite expensive for how long it will last. Tax duty is required too so all together the product does become fairly pricey.

Starting to see some baby hairs on my hairline (where I see thinning the most). Will continue using following months.

title: Gro Serum
body: I’m still using products; it’s been about a month. Simply put - THEY WORK! Downside is, if you use daily (as I do) you will run out of product in less than two weeks.

I changed nothing else about my hair care regime. Even when my hair is pulled, I have little shed. I’m almost at month 3 and I’m hoping to see a volume increase. I’m losing my hair due to Lupus and medication such as Imuran.

title: Gro Hair Serum Slowing Further Hair Loss
body: I am a male and have only used the product for two months so it is still early. While the product is not necessarily growing back my lost hair (I have some male-pattern baldness that only a hair transplant would correct), I have observed that it seems to stimulate the growth of my existing hair -- it is growing faster (that is a good thing). Also, I noticed that there are fewer hairs in the sink and shower in my second month of using the product. That is why I bought the product. So if it helps prevents or even slows further hair loss (as seems to be the case so far), I will be very pleased.

title: So Far So Good

The consistency of the serum is nice and simple to distribute, with a faint scent. Another bit is that my scalp seems a bit more itchy at times, but that may also be due to the dry weather.

title: Slowly working!

I'm hoping the scalp area gets a little more full, but I know that might take a little longer. I also don't think I'm using enough since I still have almost half of the bottle left, so I'm going to try and use a little bit more each time and see how that works. Overall, I really like what it's doing to my hair and I can't wait to see the longterm effects!

title: A must for thinning hair
body: I've always had thin hair but in 2020 my hair was falling out like crazy so I started using the vegamour hair serum. I think it's probably been 6 months or so now that I've been using it and I am very happy with the results. Although it hasn't helped that much with hair fallout it has definitely grown a lot of new hair. I can see a ton of new baby hairs along my hairline where I put the gro serum every night. The baby hairs are growing longer and longer and I keep getting new ones. I'd say it took a few months to see new growth, but I'm very happy with what I see. I think if your patient you'll be pleased with the results. Another great thing is the serum does not grease up your roots at all (which to me is absolute magic) and doesn't irritate my scalp at all (I have uber sensitive skin). Prior to using the serum I had dry itchy scalp and my scalp seems pretty balanced now so I think it has helped with that as well.

title: I've never seen my natural hair look like this!
body: I developed a terrible nervous habit last year of tugging at strands of my hair when I was stressed, to the point where I was actually pulling out a significant amount of hair, and created a bald spot on the back of my head. Quite horrified once I realized what I'd done to myself, I set out to find a way to encourage the hair to grow back as quickly as possible and didn't want a solution full of wild ingredients. I started using the vegamour serum about six months ago, and have been quite surprised by the results! By the third month, the bald spot at the back was already noticeably denser, and I started applying it more globally on my head. I have naturally quite thick hair, but the sides around my face have always been thinner, quite noticeably when my hair is in a ponytail and there are little baldish gaps. Now after 3 more months, my hair is getting denser everywhere I use the serum consistently! Not only is it clearly helping with growth, but my scalp and the grow-out I have now are the healthiest I've ever seen. My partner was so amazed by my results that he actually started using the serum himself for his own thinning spots! I'll be starting on the vitamins next month and am excited to see how that affects my results!

title: Excessive Hair Fall Almost Totally Gone!!!
body: I had started experiencing rather extreme hairloss and was feeling very down and hopeless. After researching hairloss I started recieving many targeted ads for hair growth serums; Vegamour included which after reading all of the GREAT reviews I decided to buy. Around this time a blood test confirmed I was super low on Vitamin D (I would recommend getting your vitamin D/iron levels checked if you're experiencing hairloss!!!), so I began taking 2000IU per day, along with daily doses of collagen pills. The combination of vitamin D, collagen, and 1 or 2 full squirts of the GRO Hair Serum per day for about a month have reduced my hair loss back to a normal and not upsetting to see amount of hair per day, even in/after the shower. I was worried the serum would make my hair look greasy putting it on clean hair everyday, but the consistency of the product is super light and dries in the hair very well. While I havent noticed much regrowth YET, I am definitely seeing some super promising baby hairs sprouting up and I can't wait to continue use and keep seeing results!

title: Works, but takes time!
body:
I decided to finish all three bottles of this serum over a period of three months before writing this review.
Bottom line: it works, but it takes time to work! 
I started to see a difference in hair growth within two weeks, and it's more obvious now after three months. The growth first began around my hairline with tons of new baby hairs sprouting. This was actually really interesting to see because I did NOT apply the serum to the hairline, but I guess the follicles in the hairline were stimulated and reacted first.
I have definitely noticed that my hair is thicker and that the spots that showed more scalp are slowly beginning to be covered with hair. Before, whenever I tied my hair, so much of my scalp would show, it would be so embarrassing! However, now there is less scalp showing and I think with continued usage, the results will improve. 
Additionally, I like the texture of this. This serum is really watery, so it's easy to spread and massage into the scalp and doesn't leave your hair oily.
The reason I didn't give it a full five stars is because this stuff is expensive and even when you use the amount they suggest in the directions, one bottle DOES NOT last one month.

Then the baby hairs started growing! The last time I went to have my hair done the new growth around my face was long enough to be included in my hi-lites, I nearly cried from happiness. This stuff really really works. It takes a bit but just be patient and continue using it regularly. Also I should note I have super sensitive skin and I've had no allergy reactions at all. I've recently bought their dry shampoo and it is amazing as well. I can't wait to try their other products. It's seriously worth the price if you have hair thinning concerns.

title: Exactly what I needed!
body:
I've been concerned about my hair getting thinner and finer since I was in college about 10 years ago. I didn't have bald spots yet but I could tell my hairline was slowly creeping back (especially apparent when I put my hair up). I tried several different shampoos/conditioners, treatments, and vitamins with little to no results.
THEN I FOUND VEGAMOUR AND WOW!
The key is definitely in using it consistently. I've purchased two 3 packs (definitely the way to go!). I used it every evening for the first 2 months then I went to every other evening. It's been a little over 3 months now and I can definitely tell a difference. I have lots of little baby hairs that are thicker than my other hairs coming back in around my hairline. Where you can see my scalp in my part is also a lot less wide and noticeable. I'm very pleased with the results.
That being said, you can't start using this then quit after you can't tell a difference with one bottle. Do yourself a favor and just buy the 3 pack.

So I am starting on my 4th bottle, total, the beginning of the fourth month. I do feel like the bottle in the second month of the advanced GRO showed more obvious results. I am hoping that the end of this fourth bottle , I will be able to update more obvious results. I will finish the 3 pack mid February and may try the advanced GRO one more time depending on results at that time. Both products are easy to use and I do not notice a scent. They feel cooling and non greasy. I plan on deciding at the six month mark (mid March)if I will stop completely or continue with either the GRO or Advanced GRO.

I just switched from the original grow formula to the detoxifying serum and the foam this last month and I adore them both. None of the three products I’ve used are oily, conflict with hair products or damage/irritate my scalp which leans dry/sensitive especially in winter. I’m a lifelong customer and tell all my friends about this product. Love the subscription/bulk discounts too!

title: Holy crap, it actually worked.
body:
I've had increasing unexplained hair loss and breakage for the last several years, usually the worsens in the fall/winter. I've always had thick hair, but within the last five years it's thinned out by almost 2/3 what it used to be. I'd tried supplements, hair vitamins, nutrition therapy, too many shampoos to list, etc, and figured why not try Vegamour...within two uses almost all hair shedding and stopped. I was absolutely amazed and in disbelief. I've been using for almost 3 months now and keep waiting for hair loss to return, but it hasn't! On top of it, my hair is thickening and regrowing and feels fuller and just in general more beautiful. 
I haven't noticed any difference in the breakage, but with all the new hair coming in I wonder if that will eventually change. 
I will also say, don't start with an entire dropper full! It made my hair look super oily. I'd start with about 6 drops carefully placed all over your head right after you get out of the shower, and let it air dry. I used it every 4 days and still had these results! I never leave reviews but I know how heart breaking and frustrating hair loss is so I wanted to pass this on to the next girl!

All that being said, when I started using Vegamour grow serum, within a week I started loosing half the amount of hair as per usual... within a month I could and still can count how many hairs fall out daily and let me tell you, it is very little! My hair has also grown an inch and a half in one month which has never happened to me in my life! Soooo... im hooked! The pictures posted (the first one was November 2nd and the second... title: Works even when you're lazy about it!
body: I am in my late 40s and was losing my hair from the stress of my divorce. It made me so sad and frustrated, especially when potentially getting out into the singles scene again! I have some beautiful clip-in extensions, but the problem was, my hair had gotten too sparse to cover the top of them, so you could see I was wearing extensions (embarrassing). Like anyone stumbling on Vegamour or any hair product, I was skeptical, but I was hard pressed to find a bad review of this company or the Vegamour hair serum. And there were so many miraculous reviews, so I took a chance and tried it. Because I have to be extra gentle with my hair, I only wash it every 2-3 days, and because of the slight natural oils in this serum and my naturally oily scalp, I really only apply this when my hair is wet from being washed, so about every 2-3 days. In 5 months I can say I've had obvious results (although when I look at my latest "after" photo, I see I've been missing a spot lol) . In fact, I started using this just as my hair was growing out my color, so I can tell my hair has grown literally 4 inches in 8 months!! That's insane, typically it has taken me a couple of years to grow that out. And I can definitely say there is LESS fallen hair in the shower drain! It's woken my hair up and slowed its shedding significantly, giving me a chance to let the regrowth come in. I highly recommend you give it a try and use it every day if you can, I'm sure your results will be even better than mine.

When I finally decided to stop doing damage to my hair and get it healthy, I thought I’d give Vegamour a shot and every day I’m happy I did! I still have a bit of hair fallout but it’s nowhere NEAR as bad as it used to be! The baby hairs around my hairline are growing out, and I started to see a lot of growth from hairs that seemed to never grow and always seemed to stay short. Plus my hair looks visibly thicker and healthier than before! Like I can’t believe how healthy and fluffy and soft it’s become! And it’s definitely thanks in part, (a big part!) to Vegamour!

title: This really works but you have to give it proper time!
body:
I really need to write this review because my hair has been a life-long battle. I'm 39 and started using Rogain in high school when my hair started thinning at the part with a bald spot in back. I distinctly remember a family member teasing me I was going to go bald. Rogain never made my hair grow back but it did keep the loss at bay. Then at 37 my liver levels were elevated and my doctor told me that Rogain could be the culprit. I was crushed but stop using it and my hair thinned terribly....I was thinking i would be wearing wigs by 40.

I tried Vegamour thinking there is no way this could actually work but their guarantee made me feel safe trying. At 2 months I saw no difference...at 3 months I couldn't tell but the minute my hair dresser saw me she was like 'your hair looks thicker, what are you doing?' At about 5 months I suddenly started realizing I liked my hair, I no longer had huge thin and bald patches to be subconscious about. It had bounce and volume and I actually don't have a thin part...for the first time since age 14....I am completely shocked and I can't believe the confidence boost I have. It's end of July now I started using it last October.

Friends this is worth trying but don't judge it until at least 3 months in! I can't believe how much I love my hair now I never thought this was possible.

title: Worth the price!
body: Im on my second bottle and Im already seeing results! The thinning hair on the side of my scalp is growing back in so much fuller. If you are skeptical about this purchase, I'm here to tell you, it is worth every penny!

I used it for 6 months- and all it did was sprout hair between my brows and hairline! It burned, and made my head itchy. I saw an ad for Vegamour, and instantly felt a little hope. I’m now on day 45- and I’m blown away. I have those tiny baby hairs at the top of my hair line and I’m shedding A LOT less!!!! I’m not afraid to brush my hair, or where it down like I used to. This is a total game changer, and I’m sooo thankful I found you!!

title: I finally See hair Growth!!
body: In April 2020 I was in the hospital with a life-threatening infection/abscess paired with a 103 fever, all caused by a fistula as a result of a crohns flare, I also had lost 40lbs on acct of being sick for 8 weeks leading up to my 11-day hospital stay. I had an IV of antibiotics and 3 surgeries, my body was stressed out beyond measure. About 2-3 weeks after I got out of the hospital I started to notice more and more hair fall out. Which I eventually realised I had Telogen Effluvium. It is your body's response to a trigger event (stress, sickness, surgery, child birth, anemia etc..), and can start 30-90 day after said trigger event and last usually from 3-6 months. Plus I had a lot of recovery ahead of me. Between then and now I believe I've lost about 50% or more of my hair density. I have fine hairs but a lot of them during normal times, so I'd say I have medium-thick hair. I lost the majority of my hair around my temples and in the back underneath, and that is where I always had my healthiest hair. I'm still having hair fall out a bit, but it appears to be tapering off. I've been using the GRO serum on my hair for the last 3 weeks, religiously twice a day, this being my 4th week now. I woke up this morning and I'm really seeing lots shoots of hair coming up in my front and my temples just today are noticeably denser. I've also paired this with a good consistent supplement routine, and ensuring I'm getting good quality nutrients from food as well. This product is great, I even sent side-by-side photos to my hair stylist, mom, and friends and they all were shocked by the difference. Thank you Vegamour! I can't wait to see the progress moving forward so I can share it with you all.

body: I bought my first bottle in March and with consistent application, I have noticed a difference. My hairline was getting thin around my temples and I have noticeable new growth. I also think it's helped with overall density. I apply along hairline around face and my part at night before bed and have no issues with stickiness.

body: I have only been using this product for a couple of weeks, but I am noticing less hair in the shower drain and almost none on my brush. Looking forward to seeing what results I get with a few months of use.

title: One Month In
body: I’ve been losing my hair due to hormone issues after battling cancer. I’ve been using this product twice a day (typically) for a month and I’m already noticing how much healthier it looks! I’m excited to continue using and hope to see continued results! So far I’ve been really happy.

title: A difference you can see

title: Esperanza S.

title: I can see results already!
body: This stuff is amazing. I got my order quickly and have been using it for about two weeks (ish). I can already tell a difference. My hair is thin around my ears, and I even had some bald spots, but now the bald spots are disappearing!

title: So Far So Good
body: I bought the original GRO serum without having high hopes. Biggest concern is thinning hair. I have been using for almost a month now and the first thing I noticed was that I am hardly losing any hair in the shower. Just off that alone, I went ahead and ordered the 3 pack of the Advanced serum to use after I run out of the original. I just went for a haircut yesterday and my stylist pointed out that I have new hair growth all over my head. I hadn’t told her I was using the serum but she showed me how I have tons of new baby hairs sprouting out all over my head. She said it will take a few months for them to thicken. I am now very excited to see what happens in a few more months with continuous use of this product. The serum is thin and easy to use. Doesn’t make your hair feel dirty or oily. Overall very pleased and excited by this product.

title: The verdict is still out
body: I've been using this product for about a month and haven't noticed any significant changes. I'm going to keep using and give it more time. I lose tons of hair postpartum and the entire time I breastfeed. I'm at 14 months now and hoping this can help lesssen the shedding. The product has a pleasant scent and does not make your hair greasy. I was worried about that. I wish it was easier to apply more evenly. Maybe a spritz bottle?

title: Doesn't seem to be working ...
body: I've been using the product daily for 6 months and I have seen no progress. I'm still losing more hair than I'm growing, so my hair density continues to decrease. I have to creatively style my hair to cover up balding areas. I'm giving this product a full year of patience before I bail, and will also be getting blood work done to ensure my hair loss isn't a symptom of a bigger health issue or nutritional deficiency. On a positive note: the product doesn't leave hair greasy and is gentle enough to truly use every day. But for new buyers: I'd be skeptical of all the people who claim to have used this for 1 month and are already seeing amazing results. Hair growth takes a long time and this is not a magical cure. I'll post another review in 6 months, after a full year of consistent use.

title: I’m a Hairstylist of over 20 years and tried almost everything!
body: I would not that I am a skeptic, I am a HUGE skeptic... with a certificate in Cosmetology for over 20 years. I have fine hair now having hormonal changes. Lately I’ve been trying to embrace my natural curl and hoped one day I could. I recommend this to my clients with curl but my hair use to just look scraggly if I just let it lay in its natural state. The money I have spent is insane and FINALLY this is it. I would even love to sell it to my clients in the salon, if I were to ever be able to do so. I am one of those hairstylists that is extremely honest and no BS. I promise you, maybe within the first week or so you’ll think no… then out of nowhere you’ll be like what the heck! It’s been life changing along with another supplement I use (sorry not this one but haven’t tried it) Using this and my supplement is something even my Fiancé noticed. Get it. Your welcome. Thank you Vegamour for my new hair addiction. You’ve made my hair be the hair I’ve always wanted.

title: It works
body: I noticed a difference in hair growth not only the hair on my head but also my eye brows. I will be reordering.

title: It was the first thing i found that worked... but then deliveries got severely delayed
body: I have to write this review as so far my questions have remained unanswered by email. I LOVE Vegamour - it's the only thing i have found that is working for my hair loss after a traumatic 3 years of thinning hair. However, recently my deliveries have been so delayed that i have had periods of 2-4 weeks waiting for a refill - when this is to be used every day it's a worry. Already i can see my hair starting to thin again. I understand that deliveries are more restricted due to COVID but i'm astounded to see Vegamour are still advertising for new customers while they still can't keep up with the ones they have? And still charge for orders that remain unfulfilled 3 weeks later? Vegamour need to understand that their customers rely on them - and at the very least reply to the customers email with a person response and not an automated one which doesn't answer the question asked.

title: My lifelong search is over!!
body: To say that I’ve struggled with growing my hair my entire life is an understatement. Even after giving up colouring and backing way off the heat styling, my hair usually grows I’d say no more than 2 inches a year. Which is why I almost died when I made the serious error in judgment in trying to trim my own hair during the covid lockdown and ended up with my front layers 2 inches shorter on one side. A nightmare for any girl trying to grow their hair. So, naturally I scoured the internet and ordered ALL the hair growth products. Ie silica, collagen, hair gummies, growth shampoo etc. However this product is the one thing I have only been applying to the right side of my head where I botched it, and it’s already grown an INCH in 5 weeks!! Which is actually HUGE for me. Can’t wait until it evens out and I can start applying this all over. Definitely worth giving it a try!!

However, I'm only a month in with this product, and my dandruff has completely disappeared. I mean absolutely no traces of dandruff at all! It's like a whole new world I've grown accustomed to after I've learned to live with dandruff my whole life. There has also been less shedding and a bit of hair growth too! I'm not expecting too much since I'm only a month in. I will leave another review about my results in the 3rd month!
